ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft (e.g., F-18, E-2) */,
  "tail_number" TEXT /* Tail number of the aircraft */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the aircraft */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the aircraft was commissioned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the aircraft (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_crew" (
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (pilot, navigator, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_runs" (
  "run_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each flight run */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the aircraft table */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "total_time_of_launch" REAL /* Total time of launch */,
  "average_time_per_aircraft" REAL /* Average time per aircraft */,
  "average_time_per_f18" REAL /* Average time per F-18 */,
  "average_time_per_e2" REAL /* Average time per E-2 */,
  "standard_deviation_for_f18" REAL /* Standard deviation for F-18 */,
  "standard_deviation_for_e2" REAL /* Standard deviation for E-2 */,
  "total_halo_violations_a_c" INTEGER /* Total halo violations (unexpected) A/C to A/C */,
  "total_halo_violations_f18" INTEGER /* Total halo violations (unexpected) F-18s */,
  "total_halo_violations_e2" INTEGER /* Total halo violations (unexpected) E-2s */,
  "halo_violations_person_to_a_c" INTEGER /* Halo violations (unexpected) person to A/C */,
  "brown_total_halo_violations" INTEGER /* Brown total halo (unexpected) violations */,
  "blue_total_halo_violations" INTEGER /* Blue total halo (unexpected) violations */,
  "white_total_halo_violations" INTEGER /* White total halo (unexpected) violations */,
  "green_total_halo_violations" INTEGER /* Green total halo (unexpected) violations */,
  "red_total_halo_violations" INTEGER /* Red total halo (unexpected) violations */,
  "purple_total_halo_violations" INTEGER /* Purple total halo (unexpected) violations */,
  "yellow_total_halo_violations" INTEGER /* Yellow total halo (unexpected) violations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_crew_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "run_number" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the flight runs table */,
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the flight crew table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "run_number" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the flight runs table */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure, etc.) */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date of the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "run_number" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the flight runs table */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., mechanical failure, etc.) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_values" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI value */,
  "run_number" TEXT /* Foreign key referencing the flight runs table */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI (e.g., average time per aircraft, etc.) */,
  "kpi_value" REAL /* Value of the KPI */,
  "kpi_date" TEXT /* Date of the KPI value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., commander, analyst, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
